ai.help.llm.instruct: Set custom instructions for the LLMs.
ai.help.llm.list: Check the list of supported LLMs.
ai.help.llm.set: Set the default LLM in session.
ai.help.option.no_tools: Whether to disable the tool calling for the LLMs.
ai.message.llm.list.none: Cannot find any available LLMs. Please contact the bot owner to add one.
ai.message.llm.list: The following are the available LLM(s):
ai.message.llm.list.prompt: Use "${prefix}ai llm set <LLM>" to switch LLMs.
config.comments.module_ai.llm_frequency_: The frequency penalty of the LLMs, ranging from -2 to 2.
config.comments.module_ai.llm_max_tokens: Limit the maximum number of tokens for the LLMs.
config.comments.module_ai.llm_presence_p: The presence penalty of the LLMs, ranging from -2 to 2.
config.comments.module_ai.llm_temperatur: The temperature sampling of the LLMs, ranging from 0 to 2. It is not recommended to modify it at the same time as top_p.
config.comments.module_ai.llm_top_p: The kernel sampling of the LLMs, ranging from 0 to 1. It is not recommended to modify it at the same time as temperature.
